paragraphs.content: At Lumhera, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring a safe experience for all users, especially children.

privacysecondsection.heading: Information We Collect
privacysecondsection.paragraphone: We may collect limited personal information such as:

middlelist.content: Basic account details (e.g. name, email, age range)
Technical data (device type, browser, anonymised analytics)

privacysecondsection.paragraphtwo: This gives Lumhera global credibility and makes it easy to integrate into classrooms, family learning, or national programs.

privacythirdsection.heading: How We Use Information

middlelist.content: Provide and improve the experience of Esther the Investor
Understand how users interact with the platform to enhance educational outcomes

privacythirdsection.paragraphtwo: We do not sell personal data.

paragraphs.content:
Protecting children is central to our mission.
We design our platform to minimise data collection and comply with applicable child protection and data privacy regulations. Where required, parental or school consent is obtained.
We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to safeguard data against unauthorised access, loss, or misuse.
We may use trusted third-party services (e.g. analytics or hosting providers) that comply with applicable data protection standards.
Users (or parents/guardians) may request access, correction, or deletion of personal data at any time by contacting us.

privacyeightsection.heading: Disclaimer
privacyeightsection.statementone: Esther the Investor is an educational experience designed to introduce financial concepts in an engaging and accessible way.

subsection.content: The content provided is for educational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, legal, or professional advice.
The game simplifies real-world concepts to make them understandable for children.
It should not be relied upon for making actual financial decisions.
While the experience is designed to build understanding and confidence, Lumhera does not guarantee specific financial outcomes or results.
All content, characters, and materials are the intellectual property of Lumhera and may not be reproduced or used without permission.

paragraphs.content: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or Disclaimer, please contact: belqis@lumhera.com
If you want to be slightly more formal / compliant:
This policy is designed in accordance with applicable data protection laws, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
